title: Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Super_SW_Prima.jpg]] |title=''Super Star Wars
Official Game Secrets'' |author=*[[Rusel DeMaria]] *[[Wallace Poulter]] |cover artist=[[The Dunlavey Studio]] |illustrator=*[[Marian Hartsough Associates]] {{C|Design and layouts}} *[[Ocean Quigley]] {{C|Special image processing}} |editor=*[[Roger Stewart]] {{C|Executive Editor}} *[[Neweleen Trebnik]] {{C|Managing Editor}} *[[Laurie Stewart]] {{C|Production Manager}} |publisher=[[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] |release date=[[June]] [[1993]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/47|text=Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets}} |type=Paperback |pages=224 |dimensions=5.5 x 0.5 x 8.2 inches |weight=11.2 ounces |isbn=155958405X |series=''Prima's Secrets of the Games'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets''''' is the strategy guide for the [[1992]] [[Wikipedia:Super Nintendo Entertainment System|Super Nintendo Entertainment System]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars]]''. The book was written by [[Rusel DeMaria]] and [[Wallace Poulter]], and published by [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] in [[June]] [[1993]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Contents== *Introduction *Part I - [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] I **Level 1: [[Dune Sea/Legends|The Dune Sea]] **Level 2: [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|Landspeeder]], Level I **Level 3: Outside the [[Digger crawler|Sandcrawler]] **Level 4: Inside the Sandcrawler **Level 5: Part 1: Land of the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sandpeople]] **Level 5: Part 2: Land of the [[Bantha/Legends|Banthas]] *Part II - Tatooine II **Level 6: Landspeeder to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] **Level 7: Mos Eisley **Level 8: [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] Fight **Level 9: Escape from Mos Eisley *Part III - [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] **Level 10: Death Star [[Docking Bay 327/Legends|Bay]] **Level 11: Rescue of the [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess]] **Level 12: [[Tractor beam/Legends|Tractor Beam]] Core **Level 13: Death Star [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Attack]] **Level 14: [[Meridian trench/Legends|Trench]] Battle *Super Star Wars Secret Codes ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|155958405X}}; [[June]] [[1993]]; [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]]; US paperback ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= *[[Droid/Legends|Droid]] **[[Saucer Droid]] {{1stID|Saucer Droid}} |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |ka=Super Star Wars-ის თამაშის ოფიციალური საიდუმლოებები }} [[Category:Super Star Wars strategy guides]]
